name: Ilia Guruli
title: Senior IT Project Manager
about: Senior IT Project Manager with strong experience leading Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central (BC) ERP implementations in retail, banking, and international environments. Experienced in managing ERP rollouts, cross-functional teams, and enterprise digital transformation projects.
Proven track record delivering BC solutions including Finance, HR & Payroll, Sales/POS, Purchase, and Warehouse Management modules for large-scale organizations and multinational projects.

Bachelor’s in Informatics, Mathematics and Natural Sciences
education.institution: St. Andrew the First-Called Georgian University of the Patriarchate of Georgia
